title: Pre-Award — Fringe Benefit Rate
content:
Morgan State University's fringe benefit rates used when developing sponsored project budgets. Fringe benefits are supplements to salaries and wages covering FICA/Medicare, retirement, healthcare insurance, unemployment insurance, tuition remission, TIAA/CREF, and worker's compensation. For questions, contact ORA at ask.ora@morgan.edu or 443-885-4044 (fax 443-885-8280).

Fringe benefit rates by employee category:
- Faculty (Academic Year): 42%
- Faculty (Summer): 9%
- Full-Time / Non-Contractual (Year Round): 42%
- Contractual (Year Round): 9%

Contractual employees at Morgan State University are defined as those who work less than 6 months or less than 30 hours per week.

The official fringe rate breakdown document (FringeRate-2018.pdf) is available for download from this page.

key_facts.contractual_definition: less than 6 months OR less than 30 hours per week
